problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus may resolve Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
